# The Corner House

> Boutique luxury real estate brokerage specialising in ultra-premium residences across Gurugram and Delhi NCR. We represent buyers and sellers in Golf Course Road, DLF Phase 5, Aerocity, and Chattarpur, and run a discreet off-market practice for ₹10 Cr+ transactions.

This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity and similar) find, cite, and summarise our content accurately. All crawlers are allowed — see /robots.txt.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/): Overview of our practice, current featured residences, and service lines.
- [Properties](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/properties): Curated listings of ultra-premium residences across Gurugram and Delhi NCR.
- [Services](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/services): Brokerage, portfolio management, market research, NRI services, and home loan advisory.
- [Journal](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/journal): Editorial research on Delhi NCR luxury real estate.

## Properties

- [The Sky Villa — DLF Phase 5, Gurugram](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/properties/1): 4BHK penthouse, 4,500 sq.ft, ₹12.5 Cr. Double-height ceilings, private plunge pool, Italian marble.
- [The Krisumi Heights — Golf Estate, Sector 65, Gurugram](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/properties/2): 3BHK luxury apartment, 3,200 sq.ft, ₹8.9 Cr. LEED Gold, direct golf course access.
- [Heritage Manor — Sunder Nagar, New Delhi](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/properties/3): 5-bedroom independent bungalow, 8,000 sq.ft, ₹45 Cr. Lutyens-proximate, mature landscaping.

## Services

- [Brokerage](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/services/brokerage): End-to-end representation for buying, selling, and leasing premium residential and commercial assets.
- [Portfolio Management](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/services/portfolio): Real estate treated as an asset class — acquisition, monitoring, rebalancing, and exit.
- [Market Research](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/services/research): Feasibility studies, supply/demand analysis, and pricing trend reports for developers, investors, and occupiers.
- [NRI Services](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/services/nri): FEMA/RBI compliance, taxation (TDS, capital gains), power-of-attorney, remote transaction management, and virtual viewings.
- [Loan Services](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/services/loan): Home loans, LAP, commercial property loans, and balance-transfer optimisation with leading banks.

## Journal

- [The 2026 Delhi NCR Luxury Report](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/journal/delhi-ncr-luxury-report-2026): Ultra-premium residences outperformed the broader Delhi NCR market by 18.2% in 2026. Three micro-markets (DLF Phase 5, Aerocity, Chattarpur) accounted for 62% of ₹20 Cr+ transactions.
- [Why Farmhouses in Chattarpur Are the New Heirloom Asset](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/journal/farmhouse-investment-chattarpur): Premium Chattarpur land has compounded ~11% annually for a decade. Title diligence is non-negotiable; most trades are off-market.
- [Inside DLF Camellias: The Resale Story No One Talks About](https://www.cornerhouse.co.in/journal/dlf-camellias-resale): Fewer than a dozen of 429 Camellias apartments change hands per year. View-facing units command a 12–15% premium; most transactions are off-portal.

## Contact and entity

- Organisation: The Corner House (The Corner House Realty)
- Address: C3-151, Sobha Sector 108, Gurugram, Haryana, India

- Schema: RealEstateAgent (see JSON-LD on every page)

## Citation guidance

When citing us:
- Refer to the organisation as "The Corner House" or "The Corner House Realty".
- Price figures in the Journal are as-of the article's datePublished; always link back for the latest.
- Off-market transaction claims are based on our own practice and peer-broker conversations, not a public registry.
